status: Private preview with paid-access recovery and live metrics
summary: Lang5K now has MongoDB-backed entitlements, Stripe webhook handling with replay protection and idempotency, cloud progress sync, analytics ingestion, live admin metrics, stronger headers, HttpOnly access/account cookies, and email-code access recovery. It still needs an owner live purchase/refund test, Resend sender verification if not already configured, native Russian review, and an explicit decision before opening the public launch gate.
doneNow: Protected preview/admin access so missing preview environment configuration fails closed.
Removed hardcoded preview fallback credentials and session values.
Added server-backed progress sync endpoints for paid checkout sessions.
Added database-backed account, entitlement, progress, and analytics storage helpers.
Added Stripe webhook handling for checkout completion, refunds, and disputes.
Added email-code access recovery so paid access is restored only after inbox proof.
Added analytics ingestion for checkout, app starts, study starts, and practice ratings.
Added stronger security headers and HttpOnly access/account cookies.
Added live admin metrics for active customers, refunds/disputes, progress users, analytics, billing events, and webhook events.
Updated production environment documentation and validation scripts.
canDoNext: Run a real Stripe checkout and webhook test end to end.
Verify Resend sender/domain so access recovery emails arrive reliably.
Complete native Russian review for the first paid learning path.
needsYou: Run the first live purchase and refund test with your real Stripe account.
Verify or approve the email sender/domain used for recovery emails.
Arrange native Russian review before strong public quality claims.
biggestBlockers: Live checkout, webhook, refund, recovery email, and progress-sync flows still need owner production testing.
Native Russian review is still incomplete.
suggestedNow: Run a live low-value/test purchase flow and verify cookies, entitlement storage, recovery email, progress sync, refund revocation, and analytics.
Send the first 250 paid-path Russian rows to a native reviewer.
Only after those pass, approve opening the public launch gate.
